title: Release definition: block-syntax revert + container_image_trigger coverage gap closed
essence: Reverts stages/deploy_phase/approval blocks from ConfigMode:Attr (array syntax) back to plain Terraform blocks, keeping the environment→stages rename. Adds container_image_trigger as the final writable gap from the coverage matrix. Together these mean consumers can omit optional stage fields without null-filling, and can declare container-image CD triggers natively.

checkpoints.label: Quality gate — offline unit suite
checkpoints.caption: go test -tags all -count=1 ./azuredevops/internal/service/release/... ./azuredevops/internal/service/taskagent/...
checkpoints.beforeNote: Prior schema used ConfigMode:Attr on ~25 nested blocks (stages, deploy_phase, condition, approvals, etc.), forcing consumers to use array syntax `stages = [{ … }]` and null-fill every optional sub-attribute.
checkpoints.afterNote: All ConfigMode lines removed; schema uses plain blocks. 30 unit tests pass (release package) + 8 taskagent tests. TestReleaseDefinition_ContainerImageTrigger_ExpandFlatten passes, proving expand/flatten round-trip for the new trigger type.

metrics.label: stages array syntax occurrences in acceptance test fixtures

checkpoints.label: Live acceptance — ADO REST GET
checkpoints.caption: Real vsrm.dev.azure.com REST GET of a live release definition created by TestAccReleaseDefinition_basic (TF_ACC=1)
checkpoints.beforeNote: No live acceptance tests could pass with ConfigMode:Attr because nested attributes were required at apply time (SDKv2 structural limit), causing plan/apply failures for any config that omitted optional sub-attributes.
checkpoints.afterNote: TestAccReleaseDefinition_basic applied successfully, confirmed stages.0.name='Production', idempotency re-plan produced no diff, destroy cleaned up. Live REST GET captured: https://vsrm.dev.azure.com/davidgparsonson/0066cb75-9b39-4bf3-b68d-8168de98f447/_apis/release/definitions/2?api-version=7.1

impact: Consumers can now write minimal stage blocks without null-filling every optional sub-attribute — `stages { name = "Prod" }` just works.
Container image CD triggers (`container_image_trigger`) are now declarable via Terraform — previously the only gap in trigger coverage.

All 8 writable gaps from docs/release-definition-gap-matrix.md are now mapped: environmentTriggers, artifact trigger tags, createReleaseOnBuildTagging, workflowTask.timeoutInMinutes, workflowTask.retryCountOnTaskFailure, deploymentInput.overrideInputs, containerImageTrigger, and the block-syntax surface itself.
Gap matrix updated: Triggers 9→10 mapped; overall writable-gaps row shows all 8 previously actionable items closed.
Live acceptance tests (TF_ACC) now pass end-to-end against real ADO for basic, complete, and withContainerImageTrigger scenarios.

filesChanged.note: WI-1: removed all ~25 ConfigMode:SchemaConfigModeAttr lines; WI-4: added container_image_trigger schema + expand/flatten
WI-1/WI-4: updated unit test fixtures for block syntax; added TestReleaseDefinition_ContainerImageTrigger_ExpandFlatten
WI-2/WI-5: converted all HCL fixtures from array syntax to block syntax; added TestAccReleaseDefinition_withContainerImageTrigger; added idempotency steps
WI-3: converted example HCL from array to block syntax
WI-3: converted HCL code blocks in docs from array to block syntax
WI-5: containerImageTrigger row marked 'mapped'; Triggers summary 9→10 mapped; overall totals updated
